name: Dock
description: Brazilian card issuing and banking-as-a-service platform for LATAM fintechs.

seo.title: Dock — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Dock: Brazilian card issuing and banking-as-a-service platform for LATAM fintechs.

when_to_use: Card issuing and BaaS for LATAM fintech startups building financial products
Visa/Mastercard prepaid card programs for Brazilian digital wallets
Banking-as-a-service accounts and payment flows for LATAM platforms
White-label card program launch for Brazilian marketplace or fintech

review.verdict: Credible LATAM BaaS if you need issuing plus bank rails in one stack — not for quick fintech MVPs.
review.best_for: LATAM fintechs scaling issuing and banking products at enterprise level

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
